testcase.name: test_tt_attendance_report

failure.message: playwright._impl._errors.TimeoutError: Locator.wait_for: Timeout 15000ms exceeded. Call log: - waiting for locator("table.k-selectable tbody tr").first to be visible

testcase.failure: tests\Timetracking\test_TT_Attendance_Report.py:11: in test_tt_attendance_report tt.build_attendance_report(employee_search="John Rees Haley III") tests\pages\time_tracking_page.py:207: in build_attendance_report self.page.locator("table.k-selectable tbody tr").first.wait_for(state="visible", timeout=15000) venv\Lib\site-packages\playwright\sync_api\_generated.py:17937: in wait_for self._sync(self._impl_obj.wait_for(timeout=timeout, state=state)) venv\Lib\site-packages\playwright\_impl\_locator.py:693: in wait_for await self._frame.wait_for_selector( venv\Lib\site-packages\playwright\_impl\_frame.py:341: in wait_for_selector await self._channel.send( venv\Lib\site-packages\playwright\_impl\_connection.py:69: in send return await self._connection.wrap_api_call( venv\Lib\site-packages\playwright\_impl\_connection.py:558: in wrap_api_call raise rewrite_error(error, f"{parsed_st['apiName']}: {error}") from None E playwright._impl._errors.TimeoutError: Locator.wait_for: Timeout 15000ms exceeded. E Call log: E - waiting for locator("table.k-selectable tbody tr").first to be visible
